race.description: Kce Civil Contractors Mornington Prelude Hcp
race.comment: FULMEN FILOU (5) scored at his most recent appearance, getting home by 0.9 lengths over 2230m at Grafton. That continued the good form this campaign, with four wins and five minor placings from 11 runs. Big chance once again. KING KIKAU (2) missed the frame over 2000m at Hawkesbury, beaten 3.5 lengths. Had impressed there winning at his previous outing and is better placed back to country grade. The inside gate doesn't look ideal for a back-runner but with average luck, he's a chance to bounce. INVINCIBLE RED (8) was in the placings last time beaten 1L over 1900m at Armidale. Tumbles in weight and should be poised just off the lead. One of the best contenders.TAJAWAL (4) is down from the Gold Coast. Was safely held there last time in a 78 but took out a 65 over 2050m at the track prior. Will give away a start, but has to be considered.
